text:
Jack loved adventure, so in his mind, any mundane daily task was just waiting to transform into an epic. His favorite kind of adventure was a grocery run—a task many dread. But not Jack.

On a balmy Sunday afternoon, Jack decided he would take all-nighters before the big outing. He dashed around his apartment packing snacks, juice boxes, and a map. His phone was glued to his ear, picking up the giggles and protests of his bewildered pet goldfish as he debated the merits of trail mix with nuts over raisins.

Meanwhile, somewhere under the ocean, a sea turtle had made friends with a sea lion. They chattered away about Jack's snack choices, and somehow, through their underwater conversation, they decided to visit each other during Jack’s grocery hunt.

By mid-afternoon, Jack was sweaty but triumphant as he placed every banana into its rightful bag. Just as he was about to leave, his little goldfish slipped out accidentally. Panicking, Jack
